creator: mayhem30@gmail.com
text:
xmlwriter should be removed as a required PHP extension.

It's not required to to run phpMyAdmin :

https://docs.phpmyadmin.net/en/latest/require.html

The only use for it is for those rare few who use 2FA. Those users can manually install the extension if needed.

For me and many others, this extension is loaded for no reason whatsoever.
